description: A rigorous truncation error analysis to propagate the finite N=40 Chebyshev collocation Galerkin spectrum to the infinite-dimensional operator, as in Duarte–Koch 2020, is not yet implemented. Current data only provide numerical lower bounds for σ_p. To fix, detailed norm estimates and spectral enclosure methods must be carried out for each p.
action_taken: A rigorous truncation error analysis to propagate the finite N=40 Chebyshev collocation Galerkin spectrum to the infinite-dimensional operator, as in Duarte–Koch 2020, is not yet implemented. Current data only provide numerical lower bounds for σ_p. To fix, detailed norm estimates and spectral enclosure methods must be carried out for each p.
